message:
test(core): comprehensive type coverage for CRDT, protocol, provenance, policy

Expand unit test coverage across 4 core modules (+2055 lines total):

- crdt.rs (+233): CrdtActorId clone/hash/serde/equality, OrSetTag
  serde/equality/ordering/hash, LwwEntry coverage
- protocol.rs (+621): UsageMetricKind as_str/serde/copy for all 6
  variants, UsageMetric factory methods (api_credits/tokens/bytes/
  duration_ms/requests/custom), serde roundtrips, Display impls,
  ConnectorStatusResponse construction/defaults
- provenance.rs (+900): IntegrityLevel display/default/as_u8/serde/
  copy/hash for all 5 variants, ConfidentialityLevel same coverage,
  Provenance builder patterns, label validation, zone boundary tests
- policy.rs (+301): additional diff coverage tests, policy preview
  edge cases, zone policy delta validation

All tests are pure unit tests with no async dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
